actions.name: configure_sites_selected_access
actions.description: Grant a target Entra app registration Read, Write, Manage, or FullControl access to a specified SharePoint Online site through an interactive PnP.PowerShell admin sign-in. Call this when configuring least-privilege selected-site access for an app that already has Graph Sites.Selected application permission and admin consent.

parameters.name: site_url
parameters.description: The full SharePoint Online site URL to grant access to, for example https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/Finance.

parameters.name: pn_pclient_id
parameters.description: The client ID of the PnP.PowerShell interactive login app registration used for the delegated admin sign-in.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: The application/client ID of the target Entra app registration that should receive Sites.Selected permission on the site.

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: The display name to use for the target app permission entry on the selected SharePoint site.

parameters.name: permission
parameters.description: The selected-site permission level to grant to the target app. Supported values are Read, Write, Manage, and FullControl.

parameters.name: install_module_if_missing
parameters.description: Whether to install the PnP.PowerShell module for the current user if it is missing. Accepts true or false; defaults to true.

config_requirements.description: The ID of the Azure AD tenant to connect to.
The client ID of the service principal used for authentication.
The client secret of the service principal used for authentication.
Path to the certificate used for service principal authentication.
